title: Best ipad keyboard cases | Bin Diving
description: AI-dug recommendations for best ipad keyboard cases. Compare options and find one that fits.

recommendations.product_name: Apple Magic Keyboard for iPad (11-inch / 12.9-inch variants)
Logitech Combo Touch (keyboard case with trackpad)
pros: Full row of function keys and good typing comfort
cons: Some users report durability concerns with the outer material

recommendations.product_name: ZAGG Pro Keys (Detachable keyboard case, Pro Keys / Pro Keys 2 variants)
pros: Protective case with good key travel and backlighting options
Detachable keyboard + trackpad options on many models
cons: Some reports of wear and Bluetooth quirks on older models
